data.body: Structural boundary tests delivered per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5: SKILL.md files are LLM instruction files that cannot be executed as shell commands, making end-to-end pipeline tests infeasible at this level. The child tasks (6387-2c18, 787e-40e5, a35f-db8d) correctly interpreted the DDs as structural boundary tests — asserting that the required section headings, refusal gates, and behavioral tokens are present in each SKILL.md. Runtime behavior is covered by the existing behavioral tests for the scripts (sprint-manual-drain.sh, classify-sc-shape.sh) those instructions delegate to. DD4 confirmed: all three tests run via validate.sh --ci auto-discovery.
